goal: 100 founder + investor signups per day; convert visitors to paying Oracle/Pantheon subscribers
conversion_chain: visitor → preview → signup → use (matches/wizard) → pricing → checkout → paid

milestones.note: Pricing experiments + activation loops driving MRR

agent_roles.research: Survey market — founder/investor pain, pricing sensitivity, workflow friction
agent_roles.product: Prioritize backlog — specs for features that move preview→signup→use→pay
agent_roles.growth: Test signup schemas, hero entry, pricing copy — maximize conversion at each stage
agent_roles.pipeline: Keep match quality trustworthy — retention and paid conversion depend on it

autopilot.weekly_full: All three LLM agents + pipeline dashboard
